scripts.preinstall: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); ['package-lock.json', 'yarn.lock'].forEach(f => fs.existsSync(f) && fs.unlinkSync(f)); if (!process.env.npm_config_user_agent.startsWith('pnpm/')) { console.error('Use pnpm instead'); process.exit(1); }"
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
scripts.dev:api: dotenv -e .env -- cross-env PORT=8000 pnpm -C artifacts/api-server run dev
scripts.dev:web: dotenv -e .env -- cross-env PORT=8001 pnpm -C artifacts/cleancity run dev
